song.title: O Jesus Christ Grow Thou in Me
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) O Jesus Christ, grow Thou in me, And all things else recede; My heart be daily nearer Thee, From sin be daily freed.
[C] Chorus Each day let Thy supporting might My weakness still embrace; My darkness vanish in Thy light, Thy life my death efface.
[V2] 2) In Thy bright beams which on me fall, Fade every evil thought; That I am nothing, Thou art all, I would be daily taught.
[V3] 3) More of Thy glory let me see, Thou Holy, Wise, and True; I would Thy living image be, In joy and sorrow too.
[V4] 4) Fill me with gladness from above, Hold me by strength divine; Lord, let the glow of Thy great love Through all my being shine.
[V5] 5) Make this poor self grow less and less, Be Thou my life and aim; Oh, make me daily through Thy grace More meet to bear Thy name.
song.author: Johann C. Lavater
